case_title: FRANCIS CHANG VS. DAMON AITKEN ET AL

docket_entries.description: RETURNED MAIL: ORDER OF DISMISSAL MAILED TO PLAINTIFF RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY CHANG, FRANCIS AS TO DEFENDANT AITKEN, DAMON TIEN, AMY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-01-2016 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
